content:
As a result, we will in any case apply either a bigger than needed duty-cycle, causing the
current increase beyond the steady-state level, or a lower than needed duty-cycle, causing the
current decrease below the steady-state value. is happens because the converter output current
is, to a first approximation, proportional to the integral of the inverter average output voltage, that
is in turn, proportional to the duty-cycle. Commutations between the two states are determined
by the current controller, that reacts to the current error build-up by changing the duty-cycle.
is results in a persistent oscillation, i.e., a limit cycle, of the control variables, that is
not due to any system instability, but only to the presence of the output quantization. Of course,
the amplitude and frequency of the limit cycle are largely dependent on several controller and
converter parameters like, for example, controller bandwidth, open loop system time constants
and open loop system static gain. Please note that, in cases like the half-bridge converter we
are considering here, where the input to output converter transfer function presents a low-pass
behavior well approximated by an integral action, this type of limit cycle is practically unavoidable. 翻译

moves.text_span: em instability, but only to the presence of the output quantizat

content: 因此，无论如何，我们都会应用比必要电周期更大的电周期，导致电流超出稳态水平增加，或者比必要电周期更小的电周期，导致电流低于稳态值。这是因为变换器输出电流在一定程度上与反馈系统平均输出电压的积分成比例关系，而反馈系统平均输出电压又与电周期成比例关系。两种状态之间的换向是由电流控制器决定的，当电流误差逐渐累积时，控制器通过改变电周期来响应变化。这导致了一种持久的振荡，即限制循环，控制变量的幅值和频率很大程度上取决于多个控制器和变换器参数，如控制器带宽、开环系统时间常数和开环系统静态增益。请注意，在像我们这里考虑的半桥变换器这样的情况下，输入到输出变换器转移函数呈现出很好的低通行为，可被积分动作很好地逼近，这种类型的限制循环几乎是不可避免的。

Within the general digital control theory, limit cycles have been extensively studied, with
different degrees of detail and complexity. In power electronics and, more precisely, in the area of
DC-DC converter applications, several fundamental papers on quantization resolution and limit
cycling have been published, like, for example [4, 5] and others there cited. Without entering
too much into this fairly complex topic, we would now like to review the fundamental conditions
for the elimination of limit cycles. It is worth clarifying, right from the start, that the conditions
reported hereafter are necessary, but not sufficient, for the elimination of limit cycle oscillations.
erefore, the actual presence and amplitude of LCOs are usually checked by means of time-
domain simulations. is may be a time-consuming investigation, since the presence of LCOs
strongly depends on the converter operating point, e.g., on the load current and input voltage
levels. In some cases, the system does not show LCOs, unless for a very small set of output current
values. In addition, a limit cycle can sometimes be triggered only by some particular transients,
having a very particular amplitude. It is therefore not so easy to make sure of the absence of LCOs
in all the operating conditions of interest.

having a

content: 在一般的数字控制理论中，限制循环得到了广泛研究，研究程度有不同的详细程度和复杂性。在功率电子学中，更准确地说，在DC-DC转换器应用领域，已经发表了几篇关于量化分辨率和限制循环的基础论文，例如[4,5]等。不会过多涉及这个相当复杂的话题，我们现在想回顾消除限制循环的基本条件。值得从一开始就澄清的是，下面报告的条件是必要的，但不足以消除限制循环振荡。因此，实际存在和幅值的LCO通常通过时间域仿真来检查。这可能是一个耗时的调查，因为LCO的存在强烈依赖于变换器的工作点，例如，负载电流和输入电压水平。在某些情况下，除非输出电流值非常小，否则系统不会显示LCO。此外，限制循环有时只能被某些特定的瞬态触发，瞬态具有非常特定的幅度。因此，并不容易确保在所有感兴趣的操作条件下不存在LCO。

content:
Intel Core i9-11995WX是英特尔最新一代的工作站CPU之一，于2021年5月发布。它采用LGA4189插槽，基于10nm SuperFin工艺，拥有18个处理器核心和36个线程，并且支持PCIe 4.0。它的主要规格如下：

- 核心数量：18个
- 线程数量：36个
- 基础主频：2.6GHz
- 最大睿频：4.5GHz
- Smart Cache 大小：24.75 MB
- TDP：270W
- 支持DDR4-3200内存
- 支持PCIe 4.0 x16接口
- 集成UHD 750显卡

Core i9-11995WX是一款强大的工作站CPU，适合需要大量计算资源和高效数据处理的应用，如科学计算、金融分析、3D建模和视频制作等领域。

content:
However, in order to review the fundamental conditions for the existence of a LCO-free
steady-state operating point, let us consider the digitally controlled power converter shown in
Fig. 3.6(a), where we assume that the dominant quantization effects derive from the ADC and
the DPWM, while the rounding effects in the control algorithm are neglected. As a matter of fact,
the fixed-point arithmetic and the coefficient round-off may play a relevant role in the accuracy
of the controller frequency response definition and in the amplification of quantization noise.
Nevertheless, a practical design approach is often based on the assumption of infinite controller
arithmetic resolution and on the verification, a posteriori, by means of time-domain simulations
and experiments.
然而，为了回顾无LCO稳态工作点存在的基本条件，让我们考虑图3.6(a)中所示的数字控制电源转换器，假设量化效应主要来自ADC和DPWM，而在控制算法中忽略取整器效应。实际上，定点算术和系数截断可能在控制器频率响应定义的准确性和量化噪声的放大方面发挥重要作用。然而，实际的设计方法通常基于控制器算术分辨率无限制的假设，并通过时间域仿真和实验事后验证。

content:
e first condition is to ensure that the variation of one DPWM level, i.e., 1 LSB of the
duty-cycle digital representation, here denoted as qDPWM, does not yield a variation of the con-
trolled output variable x.t/, in steady-state conditions, greater that the quantization step of x.t/,
第一个条件是确保DPWM电平的变化（即占空比数字表示的1个LSB），在稳态条件下，不会导致被控制的输出变量x(t)的变化超过x(t)的量化步长。

is guarantees that the
DPWM, by itself, has enough resolution to steadily keep the quantized regulation error inside its
zero bin. It is worth noting that this reasoning applies to the control of DC quantities, while the
analysis, and even the interpretation, of limit cycles in the presence of time-varying references (as
in DC-AC converters) may be significantly different.
这可以确保DPWM本身具有足够的分辨率，以稳定地将量化的调节误差保持在其零位置。值得注意的是，这种推理适用于直流量的控制，而在存在时间变化的参考值时（如在DC-AC转换器中），限制循环的分析甚至解释可能会有显著的不同。
